per_question_results.question: 住民監査請求はどのような手続きで行うのか?
行政不服審査の請求期間はどれくらいか?
正当防衛が成立する要件は何か?
職務質問はどのような場合に行うことができるか?
契約を解除すると、解除前に行った給付はどうなるか?
公序良俗に反する契約はどうなるか?
納税申告に誤りがあった場合、納税者が自ら正すための手続きは?
給与所得の金額はどのように計算するか?

interpretation.summary: TF-IDF (char n-gram baseline) cannot retrieve any expected article in top-10 across all 8 eval queries. Recall@10 = 0%.
interpretation.root_cause: Semantic gap between question vocabulary and statutory text. Questions use everyday legal terms (正当防衛, 公序良俗, 住民監査請求) while statutes use more formal phrasing (急迫不正の侵害, 公の秩序又は善良の風俗, 監査委員に対する請求). Character n-gram lexical matching cannot cross this gap.
implications: Data preparation alone (the 3,772 corpus) is insufficient for RAG.
Embedding model choice is decisive. A multilingual semantic embedding (e.g. multilingual-e5, OpenAI text-embedding-3) is expected to bridge the gap.
This baseline result validates the project's roadmap: Phase 1 後半 priorities should include real embedding model evaluation, not just data expansion.
next_runs_planned: OpenAI text-embedding-3-small (commercial, baseline for ML community comparability)

notes: Run executed in JuriCode-JP sandbox env. sentence-transformers / torch could not be installed within sandbox time budget, so TF-IDF used as a controlled baseline. Sandbox: scikit-learn 1.7.2, numpy 2.2.6. Wall clock: embed.py ~16s, retrieve.py < 5s.
